05 — About

The editor
behind the cut.

I'm Yusuf Goudh — based in Egypt. I'm not just an editor who makes videos — I'm your partner in your story.

Your goals are my goals. I bring full attention to every frame, every cut, every second of sound design. Whether you're a creator trying to grow or a filmmaker telling a story — I'll help you get there with a vision that makes your content feel like you.
